## TypedServiceImplementation type

Strip the "untypedness" from a type defined from UntypedServiceImplementation so we can actually build our class.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type TypedServiceImplementation<T extends UntypedServiceImplementation> =
  WithoutIndexSignature<T>
```
